spoilers.title: Oda about One Piece: One Piece may be a humongous story, but I love for people to enjoy the casual banter on the ship between the Straw Hats. Or the relationship with the people they meet on the vario
spoilers.text: Oda about One Piece: One Piece may be a humongous story, but I love for people to enjoy the casual banter on the ship between the Straw Hats. Or the relationship with the people they meet on the various islands. It's those little things that matter most to me. So I hope you read it casually. I always tell people that Manga isn't a big deal. It's a way to kill time. I want to be the king of wasting time, so I hope people just read and watch it casually.

misc.title: Luffy voice actress Mayumi Tanaka after receiving the “Best Supporting VA” award at the 20th Seiyuu Awards for her role as Turbo Granny in Dandadan said: “I don’t think I’ll be able to live as long as
misc.text: Luffy voice actress Mayumi Tanaka after receiving the “Best Supporting VA” award at the 20th Seiyuu Awards for her role as Turbo Granny in Dandadan said: “I don’t think I’ll be able to live as long as Mako-san (Masako Nozawa,Goku Va), but I’ll do my best for another 10 years or so.”

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1177 I made a theory in the past about why Blackbeard attacked Drum Kingdom during the pre-timeskip. My theory was that they were searching for the Nika Devil Fruit. With the latest chapter,
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1177 I made a theory in the past about why Blackbeard attacked Drum Kingdom during the pre-timeskip. My theory was that they were searching for the Nika Devil Fruit. With the latest chapter, it’s possible that they might have actually been after Chopper’s Devil Fruit! 🦌🍄 This seemingly joke interaction in Chapter 650 doesn’t feel like a joke anymore! 👀🤯 The Will of Marco (マルコの意志) (@TheWillOfMarco) THEORY Marshall D. Teach aka. Blackbeard came to Drum Island in search for the Hito-Hito no Mi, Model: Nika [THREAD] #ONEPIECE #ONEPIECE1071 — https://nitter.net/TheWillOfMarco/status/1609485523835580417#m

misc.title: Lol wtf, did something like this ever happend??? Fabrizio Romano (@FabrizioRomano) 🚨🇲🇦 BREAKING: Morocco have been announced as AFCON winners with final result overturned by CAF. Senegal have been
misc.text: Lol wtf, did something like this ever happend??? Fabrizio Romano (@FabrizioRomano) 🚨🇲🇦 BREAKING: Morocco have been announced as AFCON winners with final result overturned by CAF. Senegal have been declared to have forfeited the match with Morocco declared 3-0 winners by official statement. CAF statement tonight. ⤵️🇲🇦 — https://nitter.net/FabrizioRomano/status/2034022027393191984#m
